title: Mereel Skirata
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Mereel|more=Null (disambiguation)}} {{Update|[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image=[[File:Null-7.jpg]] |name=Mereel Skirata
"Null-7" |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth=c.[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] **[[Clan Skirata]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|But there's one thing I don't know yet—and that's how they controlled the aging process. That's the key. They robbed us of a full life span. But we will ''not'' be defeated by time, ''ner vod''.|Mereel in a transmission to Ordo Skirata about developing the aging cure|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''}} '''Mereel Skirata''', formerly known as '''Null-7''' or '''N-7''' and better known as '''Mereel''', was a lieutenant and one of six [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s created for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. He was named after former [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Jaster Mereel]], Jango Fett's mentor. ==Biography== ===Early life=== At the chronological age of two, he and his fellow Nulls were brought before the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] scientist [[Orun Wa]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] for review. When the Kaminoans attempted to terminate the Nulls, he snatched Skirata's holdout [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and tossed it to his brother [[Ordo Skirata|Null-11]], nicknamed Ordo, who leveled it at Orun Wa. Skirata managed to get the weapon back, and received command of the Nulls as he was the only one who could control them. After that incident, Kal Skirata brought the Nulls up as sons. ===Clone Wars=== Mereel and the other Null-class ARCs, though they worked for the GAR, Grand Army of the Republic, were constantly hunting for clues to the location of the Kaminoan scientist [[Ko Sai/Legends|Ko Sai]] so they and Kal Skirata could find out how to stop the clones' accelerated aging. Mereel participated in the [[Mission to Coruscant (Clone Wars)|black op]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], led by Skirata, to destroy the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] terrorist cells operating on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] along with his brother Ordo, [[Walon Vau]], [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]], [[Omega Squad]], [[Etain Tur-Mukan]], and [[Bardan Jusik]]. A few months later, he participated in an unauthorized [[Mission to Kamino (Clone Wars)|mission to Kamino]]. Disguised as a normal [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]], he accessed the [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] computer mainframe for any information on Ko Sai. Although he didn't find any, he did download part of a secret conversation between [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] [[Lama Su/Legends|Lama Su]], that revealed that secret cloning facilities had been set up on Coruscant and that the Republic wasn't planning to order any future batches of clones from Kamino. As the search for Ko Sai intensified, Mereel's single-minded patience paid off and led to the capture of the Kaminoan scientist. Not having happy memories of her, Mereel reintroduced himself to Ko Sai with his [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] prod, causing Kal Skirata to worry that Mereel would lose control. Of all the Nulls, Mereel had been the most carefree and charming, and it was because of these traits that Kal chose him for this delicate part of the mission. Later, Mereel worked with Etain to make Ko Sai create a cure for the clones' accelerated aging, while becoming a journeyman expert himself in genetics. When Ko Sai finally came to the end of her rope and hung herself, Mereel gathered his brothers to "prepare" the body for shipping. Mereel's trademark smile, an indication he didn't have a care in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], never faltered. ===Post–Clone Wars=== Shortly after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was issued, Mereel and the rest of the Nulls deserted and started anew on Mandalore. When Kal nearly broke down after seeing [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] (nicknamed Scout), because she looked like Etain, Mereel helped Kal back inside their home. Mereel also got along with [[Kina Ha]], the Kaminoan [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], which was amazing as he hated all Kaminoans. Like the other Nulls, Mereel was disgusted with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] release of the virus [[FG36]] on [[Gibad/Legends|Gibad]], and planned with them to hide in the water reservoir or the fuel tank of [[Nyreen Vollen]]'s ship, ''[[Cornucopia]]'', to avoid Imperial inspection once they retrieved [[Darman Skirata]] and [[Niner Skirata]] from Coruscant. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I'll get Jaing to set up personal accounts for you all. Private, to spend as you like. None of my business.''"
"''I'll only spend mine on fast speeders, slow women, and overpriced candy.|Kal Skirata and Mereel|''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''}} Mereel was the most "charming, entertaining, and sociable" of the Nulls, and was relatively well adjusted to life outside Kamino. A ladies' man, his romances tended to be minor and brief. Thanks to his influence, [[Corr Skirata|Corr]] also behaved in this manner. Mereel could easily handle most social situations. At one time he "held court" in the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] Staff and Social club, entertaining commandos and CSF officers alike by reciting swear words in other languages. He reacted to many situations more calmly than his brother Ordo, and had a good sense of humor, often joking around or making witty remarks. Mereel was frequently described as a "daredevil lunatic," a trait that often caused his "[[Kal Skirata|father]]" and brothers anxiety. He sought out thrills, purposely skating on thin ice in everything from negotiations with techs to piloting and rapid-roping. Kal noticed that Mereel seemed to feel the need to take risks and excel in order to edge out of Ordo's shadow. He also shared many traits with his Null brothers. He had a peckish appetite, and a sweet tooth, which Skirata theorized might be due to his maturation, and the metabolic need to fuel his rapid aging. Due to the Kamioans' genetic tinkering, Mereel and the other Nulls had very intense loyalties—either they would die for you, or you would end up dead. Like his brothers, Mereel was loyal only to Kal Skirata, and his family. The Kaminoans changed the Nulls' genes so that Mereel and his brothers had perfect memories. This often came in handy during Mereel's work, allowing him to memorize codes, manuals, and other information. These abilities eventually led to his specialization in slicing and genetics. However, the same genetic tinkering, paired with his brutal childhood, gave Mereel and the other Nulls a fierce, resounding hatred of Kaminoans. Mereel enjoyed piloting ''[[Gi'ka]]'', a [[Wavechaser]] submersible bought on [[Dorumaa]]. He favored [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] heavy weapons; his weapons of choice were the [[Z-6 rotary blaster cannon/Legends|Z-6 rotary blaster cannon]] and the [[Reciprocating quad blaster cannon/Legends|reciprocating quad blaster]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}} *{{InsiderCite|87|Odds}} *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Mereel}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' {{C|under ''Mereel''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NullARCsNav}} {{Interlang |cs=Mereel Skirata |de=Mereel Skirata |pl=Mereel Skirata }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Skirata, Mereel}} [[Category:Clan Skirata]] [[Category:Clone trooper lieutenants]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Null-class Advanced Recon Commandos]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
